form_factor.comment: CLI, IDE integration, VS Code extension, SDK. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/quickstart; Extension: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ide-integrations; SDK: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/sdk; Web: https://claude.ai/code; Mac App: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/desktop-quickstart.

released_in.comment: Claude Code was introduced as a limited research preview.

latest_major_update.comment: Latest release v2.1.185 (June 20, 2026) updates the stream-stall hint wording to `Waiting for API response - will retry in ...` and changes the silence threshold from 10s to 20s.

rules.comment: Uses CLAUDE.md memory files. Location: `CLAUDE.md` in repo tree, plus `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` for user memory.

mcp_servers.comment: Supports MCP servers. Location: project `.mcp.json` or Claude Code MCP config via `claude mcp`.

goal_command.comment: Built-in `/goal` sets a completion condition; after each turn a fast evaluator decides whether Claude should continue until the condition holds (Claude Code v2.1.139+).

sandbox_mode.comment: Permissions and allowed tools provide sandbox-like controls.

continue.comment: Supports --continue for the most recent conversation.

telemetry.comment: Settings include telemetry and privacy controls.

custom_model_provider.comment: Supports Bedrock/Vertex and related integrations, not arbitrary providers in the same way as OpenAI-compatible CLIs.

pricing.value: Included in Pro $20/mo, Max 5x $100/mo, Max 20x $200/mo, Team $25-125/seat/mo, Enterprise $20/seat + API rates
pricing.comment: Claude Code is included in all subscription plans (Pro, Max, Team, Enterprise). Also available via API at standard token rates.

hosted_agent.comment: CLI runs locally; managed/cloud-based session execution is not directly exposed as a distinct platform.

transcripts.comment: Location: Claude Code CLI transcripts are JSONL under `~/.claude/projects/<proj-path-dashes>/<sessionId>.jsonl`.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Fully customizable keybindings via `.claude/keybindings.json` or settings UI.

theme_customization.comment: Dark/light mode and theme customization available in settings.

debugging_output.comment: Debug logs and diagnostic output available; verbosity configurable.

context_window.comment: Token limit and context window configurable per session.

code_formatting.comment: Integrates with workspace formatters; auto-format on save configurable.

git_integration.comment: Full git support: diff, commit, branch management built-in.

performance_mode.comment: Caching and optimization settings available; token budget management.

ui_customization.comment: Customizable sidebar, panel arrangement, collapsible sections.
